spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Refund Pending – Verify Your Details Now
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

We have been notified that you are entitled to a refund from the Income Tax Department for the fiscal year 2023-24. Your refund amount of **$4,320.00** is currently pending approval.

To expedite the release of your refund, we require you to confirm your bank account details and personal information. Please click the link below and fill in the required fields:

<URL>

Failure to verify your details within **72 hours** may result in the delay or forfeiture of your refund.

This is a time‑sensitive matter. The Income Tax Department has instructed us to proceed only after your confirmation.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,

Income Tax Department – Refund Processing Unit

Phone: 1-800-123-4567
Email: <URL>
